title: 日本ダービーの後に・525mの青春

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, pant, huff, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both runners have put everything they have into
this race, and a generous round of applause
resounds from the spectating crowd.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks... Ines...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't pulled me along, I wouldn't have
been able to run like that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, I gotta thank you too. ♪ I knew you'd be
awesome!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You chasing me pushed me past my limit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. I'm sorry if I made you worry out
there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Racing in the Derby helped me understand. I
don't have time to feel burned out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Amazing races just like this one are still out there,
waiting for me to run in them!
choice_data_list: And you need to take a crown.
And you need to take a crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the Kikuka Sho... I don't know what kind of
race it'll be, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wanna run even better there than I did today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But think it'll take a while before I can... Just look.
My legs are like soggy noodles.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But now I know we'll be even better buddies than
we were before. That's a promise from your trusty
sidekick. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: C'mon... Nobody thinks of you as a sidekick, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Warm laughter fills the air in Fuchu today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And two fine racers stand shining under the
leaves of the giant zelkova tree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, at Kyoto Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I witness it, this is a
wonderful race, Ryan. And now... I've gotten to
see who you've become.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're still a long way from reaching my level...
However—

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text: McQueen, the ninth race is beginning soon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll be there in a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How swiftly the seasons change... All the better,
because the biggest trees display their boldest
colors in the fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The patient superstar is now chasing after Mejiro
Ryan. And the Classics still have a ways to go
before they're over.
